name: Meera Iyer
title: Senior ML Engineer
resume: Senior ML Engineer at a product company for 7 years. Built and shipped a candidate-job matching and ranking system to production serving millions of users. Designed hybrid retrieval combining BM25 with dense embeddings (sentence-transformers, E5). Operated FAISS and Elasticsearch indexes, handled embedding drift and index refresh. Built the offline evaluation framework using NDCG and MRR with offline-to-online correlation and ran A/B tests. Strong Python. Some LoRA fine-tuning.

name: Sunil Marketing
title: Marketing Manager
resume: Marketing Manager. Skills: RAG, Pinecone, embeddings, LLM, machine learning, AI, retrieval, ranking, vector database, fine-tuning, NDCG. Ran campaigns and managed marketing budgets.

name: Anita Rao
title: Software Engineer
resume: Software Engineer at an e-commerce product company. Built a recommendation system that suggests products to users, deployed to production at scale. Tuned search relevance and measured improvements with click metrics and A/B tests. Strong Python and SQL.

name: Rahul Services
title: Technical Lead
resume: Worked entirely at Infosys and TCS for 9 years on client projects. Java, Spring, some Python. Delivered enterprise applications for banking clients. No product company experience.

name: Dr. Kavya Nair
title: Research Scientist
resume: Research Scientist in an academic research lab. PhD in machine learning. Published papers on retrieval and ranking and embeddings. No production deployment experience; research-only roles.

name: Dev Perfect
title: Staff ML Engineer
resume: Built production ranking and retrieval systems with embeddings, Qdrant, NDCG evaluation and A/B testing at a product company at scale. Strong Python.

name: Imran Vision
title: Computer Vision Engineer
resume: Computer Vision Engineer. Built object detection and image classification models in production. Deployed CV pipelines at scale. PyTorch, TensorFlow. No NLP or information retrieval experience.

name: Karan Wrapper
